---
title: "CorrigePuntos"
author: "Carlos Albiach Melgar"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Librerias
```{r, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)

```

# Descomprimir fichero
```{r}
archivo_zip <- "2025-26 Tractament de les dades Gr.A-T (36423)-Tarea Intermediate R(Datacamp)-3281647.zip"
carpeta_entregas <- "entregas_descomprimidas"

unzip(archivo_zip, exdir = carpeta_entregas)
```
